title: Maximum retry delay capped at 5000ms
symptom: When attempting to set a retry delay longer than 5000ms in any node, the setting reverts back to 5000ms.
applies_when: Using any node with retry on fail settings
Attempting to set delay greater than 5000ms
not_this_if: Delay is set to 5000ms or less
Not using retry on fail feature
root_cause: n8n imposes a hard limit of 5000ms on retry delays to prevent long waits from freezing worker threads, which could lead to performance issues.
fix_steps: Open the settings tab of the failing node.
Change the 'On Error' option to 'Continue (using error output)'.
Add a Wait node and set it to the desired delay time.
Connect the error output of the failing node to the input of the Wait node.
Loop the output of the Wait node back into the input of the failing node.
agent_instruction: Set up a custom retry loop using a Wait node to handle delays longer than 5000ms.
